description: Runtime configuration for the Privileged App Path Auditor. These settings control thresholds, exclusions, and behavior. Override values here to customize for your environment.

stalePrivilege.description: Number of days without a sign-in before an app is considered stale

filters.description: Filter settings. excludeFirstPartyMicrosoftApps skips apps owned by Microsoft (publisher ID f8cdef31-a31e-4b4a-93e4-5f571e91255a) to focus on tenant-owned apps.

consentRisk.description: When true, ConsentRisk mode will enumerate apps that received user consent (not admin consent)

credentialHygiene.description: Credential type risk classification. Certificates and federated credentials are preferred over secrets (passwords).

output.description: Controls output size. Users beyond truncateAfter are summarized as '... (N more)' in console output. Full data is always included in CSV exports.
